ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(Status__c ) ), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'Completed'), OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Implementation', ISBLANK( Kick_Off_Call__c ), ISBLANK( Group_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( API_Google_Sheets_Training__c ), ISBLANK( Client_Meeting__c ), ISBLANK( Demo__c ), ISBLANK( Training_Summary__c ), ISBLANK( Product_Configuration__c ), ISBLANK( Dedicated_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( Deck__c ), ISBLANK( Insight_Email__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Group_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_1_1_training_session__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_API_Google_Sheets_Training__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Insight_Email__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Deck__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Product_Configuration__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Trial_Summary_Presentation__c ) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Engineering', ISBLANK( Excel_Analysis__c ), ISBLANK( Product_Demo__c ), ISBLANK( Insight_Email__c ), ISBLANK( Discovery_Call__c ), ISBLANK( Deck__c ), ISBLANK( Client_Meeting__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Group_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_1_1_training_session__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_API_Google_Sheets_Training__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Insight_Email__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Product_Configuration__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Trial_Summary_Presentation__c ) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_Success_Strategist', ISBLANK( Kick_Off_Call__c ), ISBLANK( Group_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( API_Google_Sheets_Training__c ), ISBLANK( Details__c ), ISBLANK( Client_Meeting__c ), ISBLANK( Demo__c ), ISBLANK( Training_Summary__c ), ISBLANK( Product_Configuration__c ), ISBLANK( Dedicated_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( Deck__c ), ISBLANK( Insight_Email__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Group_Training_Sessions__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_1_1_training_session__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_API_Google_Sheets_Training__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Insight_Email__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Deck__c ), ISBLANK( Trial_Product_Configuration__c ), ISBLANK( Excel_Analysis__c ), ISBLANK( Product_Demo__c ), ISBLANK( Discovery_Call__c ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not complete a request without checking the relevant action
